stage_identity.evidence: Teen stage Byte with gangly proportions maintained. Transition from awake-at-desk to sleeping-in-bed preserves canonical teen silhouette and limb structure.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean pixel art style preserved with dithered shading and readable silhouette. Deep night color palette (purple-blue #1a1a2e, #16213e) applied consistently.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Key requested changes visible: Byte now sleeping with closed eyes, three light blue Z's floating above head in scattered formation, cozy bed with blankets, desk tucked away, deep night lighting with twinkling Chicago skyline, transition from evening to 1 AM night scene.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, malformed anatomy, or smeared objects detected. Clean pixel boundaries throughout.

Trophy shelf above with golden 10-day trophy on left side and green plant on right side - proper spacing maintained, no overlap. Exactly three Z's floating in scattered formation above sleeping Byte. No duplicate props.

anchors_present.evidence: Chicago skyline visible through window with twinkling lights. Trophy shelf present above. Food bowl on floor. Desk and laptop tucked away as expected for sleeping state. Room structure intact.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Deep night at 1 AM (local Chicago time) correctly rendered with purple-blue darkness, twinkling city lights. Sleeping state matches is_sleeping=true flag. Peaceful content mood visible in relaxed sleeping pose despite ecstatic underlying state.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable - normal mode edit, not re-ground. Incremental change from awake evening scene to sleeping night scene.
